hero.tagline: Building things that stand the test of time.

about.label: About
about.heading: Engineer who cares about the craft.
about.p1: I'm {name}, a Full Stack Software Engineer based in {location} with over {years} years of experience. I specialize in building web applications and cloud-native systems that are fast, maintainable, and built to last.
about.p2: My work spans the full stack — from pixel-precise UIs in React and Next.js to distributed backend services in NestJS and Go, running on AWS and Kubernetes. I'm comfortable owning features from architecture through deployment.
about.p3: I believe great software comes from clarity of purpose, disciplined architecture, and a relentless focus on the people who use and maintain it.

skills.label: Skills
skills.heading: What I work with.
skills.subtitle: Technologies I reach for on a regular basis, from frontend to cloud infrastructure.

projects.label: Projects
projects.heading: Selected work.
projects.subtitle: Projects that demonstrate my approach to architecture, performance, and engineering quality.

manifesto.label: Manifesto
manifesto.heading: Resilience. Journey. Vision.
manifesto.resilienceBody: Software is messy. Requirements change, systems fail, deadlines slip. What separates great engineers is how they respond — with methodical thinking, grit, and a bias for action.
manifesto.journeyBody: I don't believe in destinations. Every project, every bug, every late-night debugging session is a step forward. The engineer I am today exists because I stayed curious and kept building.
manifesto.visionBody: Code is the easy part. Seeing three years ahead — knowing which abstractions will hold, which shortcuts will cost you — that's the hard part. I build with the long game in mind.

philosophy.label: Engineering Philosophy
philosophy.heading: How I think about software.
philosophy.subtitle: Principles that guide my decisions, from architecture to code review.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Let's work together.
contact.body: I'm open to senior and staff engineering roles where I can build impactful products and collaborate with strong teams. Reach out via email or connect on LinkedIn.

footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS
